subcodes.first_line: O thou who art firm in the Covenant! Though there be scant opportunity for writing and utterance, and the honoured ones have been in seclusion for a time [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان هر چند تحریر و تقریر فرصت نیست و حضرات مدتی در اندرون بودند
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @service to others; to the Cause of God
